name: @radzor/sse-stream
description: Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming server. Create named streams, push typed events, and manage client connections with automatic reconnection support.

inputs.name: retryMs
inputs.description: Reconnection interval hint sent to clients (default: 3000ms).

inputs.name: keepAliveInterval
inputs.description: Interval in ms for sending keep-alive comments to prevent connection timeout (default: 15000).

inputs.name: maxClients
inputs.description: Maximum number of concurrent SSE clients per stream (default: 1000).

outputs.name: streamInfo
outputs.type: { streamId: string; clientCount: number; totalEventsSent: number }

fields.name: totalEventsSent
fields.description: Total events pushed to this stream.

events.name: onClientConnected
events.description: Fired when a client subscribes to a stream.

events.name: onClientDisconnected
events.description: Fired when a client disconnects from a stream.

actions.name: createStream
actions.returns: { streamId: string; handler: (req: IncomingMessage, res: ServerResponse) => void }
actions.description: Create a named SSE stream and return the HTTP handler to mount on your server.

actions.name: pushEvent

params.name: eventType
params.description: SSE event type (maps to 'event:' field). Default: 'message'.

actions.description: Push an event to all clients on a stream. Returns number of clients reached.

actions.name: closeStream
actions.description: Close a stream and disconnect all its clients.

llm.constraints: Server-only. The createStream handler must be mounted on an HTTP server (Node http module, Express, Fastify, etc.). No external dependencies. Clients reconnect automatically via the retry field. Use keepAliveInterval to prevent proxy/load-balancer timeouts.
